name: slider
description: A single-thumb range slider; wraps a native input[type=range] for free ARIA semantics (aria-valuemin/max/now, keyboard navigation).
docs: Register <lv-slider> by importing components/ui/slider.ts from your entry point. Bind `value`, `min`, `max`, `step`. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the new numeric value. Set `show-value` to render the current value beside the track.
